title: Quick-Win Feature Parity
overview: Close 27 feature gaps identified in features-comparison.md against agent-browser, gstack, and browser-use. All S-effort Playwright API calls — 5-15 line case blocks in existing switch statements.
scopeChallenge: Every feature maps directly to an existing Playwright API and follows the same pattern as existing commands. EXPANSION mode selected for per-feature granularity.

failureModes.mitigation: Catch Playwright error, rewrite to actionable message suggesting emulate

failureModes.risk: swipe touch events not supported in headless
failureModes.mitigation: Use page.evaluate to dispatch synthetic TouchEvents as fallback

failureModes.risk: Chain command sets out of sync
failureModes.mitigation: Update both server.ts sets AND meta.ts chain sets
Apply truncation to data field only, not JSON wrapper

testCoverageMap.codepath: cookie clear + cookie set with options

tasks.title: Add rightclick command
tasks.description: Add rightclick <sel> to src/commands/write.ts. Uses locator.click({ button: 'right' }). Register in WRITE_COMMANDS, WRITE_SET in chain, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse rightclick <sel> right-clicks the element
browse rightclick @e1 works with ref selectors
browse rightclick with no args throws usage error

tasks.title: Add tap command
tasks.description: Add tap <sel> to src/commands/write.ts. Uses locator.tap(). Requires hasTouch context. Register in WRITE_COMMANDS, WRITE_SET in chain, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse tap <sel> taps the element when context has hasTouch
browse tap @e1 works with ref selectors
Tap on non-touch context throws actionable error

tasks.title: Add swipe command
tasks.description: Add swipe <dir> [px] to src/commands/write.ts. Uses touchscreen API. Directions: up, down, left, right. Default distance: one viewport height/width.
acceptanceCriteria: browse swipe down swipes down by one viewport height
browse swipe up 500 swipes up by 500px
browse swipe with no direction throws usage error

tasks.title: Add mouse subcommands
tasks.description: Add mouse move|down|up|wheel to src/commands/write.ts. Uses page.mouse API. Register mouse in WRITE_COMMANDS, WRITE_SET in chain, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse mouse move 100 200 moves cursor to (100, 200)
browse mouse wheel 300 scrolls down by 300px
browse mouse with no subcommand throws usage error

tasks.title: Add keyboard inserttext command
tasks.description: Add keyboard inserttext <text> to src/commands/write.ts. Uses page.keyboard.insertText(text). Register keyboard in WRITE_COMMANDS, WRITE_SET in chain, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse keyboard inserttext 'hello' inserts text at cursor
browse keyboard with no subcommand throws usage error
browse keyboard inserttext with no text throws usage error

tasks.title: Extend wait with --text, --fn, --load, --state hidden, millisecond wait
tasks.description: Extend existing wait case in src/commands/write.ts:167-195 with five new modes. Update CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse wait --text 'Hello' waits for text to appear
browse wait --fn 'document.title === "Done"' waits for JS condition
browse wait --load domcontentloaded waits for load state
browse wait #spinner --state hidden waits for element to disappear
browse wait 2000 waits for 2 seconds
browse wait --text with no text arg throws usage error

tasks.title: Extend cookie with clear and options
tasks.description: Extend existing cookie case in src/commands/write.ts:205-219 with cookie clear and cookie set with --domain, --secure, --expires, --sameSite options.
acceptanceCriteria: browse cookie clear clears all cookies
browse cookie set auth token123 --domain .example.com --secure sets cookie with options
Existing browse cookie name=value still works
browse cookie set with missing name/value throws usage error

tasks.title: Add set geo subcommand
tasks.description: Add set command with geo subcommand to src/commands/write.ts. Uses context.setGeolocation() + context.grantPermissions(['geolocation']). Register set in WRITE_COMMANDS, WRITE_SET in chain, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse set geo 37.7749 -122.4194 sets geolocation
navigator.geolocation returns set coordinates (verify via browse js)
browse set geo with missing args throws usage error

tasks.title: Add set media subcommand
tasks.description: Extend set command (from TASK-008) with media subcommand. Uses context.emulateMedia({ colorScheme }). Values: dark, light, no-preference.
acceptanceCriteria: browse set media dark sets color scheme to dark
window.matchMedia('(prefers-color-scheme: dark)').matches returns true
browse set media with no value throws usage error

tasks.title: Add --max-output flag
tasks.description: Add --max-output <n> flag to src/cli.ts and X-Browse-Max-Output header. In src/server.ts, truncate result before content boundaries/JSON wrapping. Support BROWSE_MAX_OUTPUT env var.
acceptanceCriteria: browse --max-output 100 text truncates output to 100 chars with notice
BROWSE_MAX_OUTPUT=500 env var works as default
Output shorter than limit is returned unchanged

tasks.title: Add scrollinto alias
tasks.description: Add scrollinto/scrollintoview as alias commands in src/commands/write.ts that delegate to the existing scroll-into-view behavior. Register in WRITE_COMMANDS, WRITE_SET in chain, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse scrollinto #bottom-marker scrolls element into view
browse scrollintoview @e1 works with refs
browse scrollinto with no selector throws usage error

tasks.title: Add box read command
tasks.description: Add box <sel> to src/commands/read.ts. Uses locator.boundingBox() → returns JSON { x, y, width, height }. Register in READ_COMMANDS, READ_SET in chain, SAFE_TO_RETRY, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse box #target returns JSON with x, y, width, height
browse box @e1 works with ref selectors
browse box with no selector throws usage error
Element not found returns clear error

tasks.title: Add errors read command
tasks.description: Add errors [--clear] to src/commands/read.ts. Filters console buffer for level === 'error'. Register in READ_COMMANDS, READ_SET in chain, SAFE_TO_RETRY, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse errors returns only error-level console entries
browse errors --clear clears error entries
Returns (no errors) when no error entries exist

tasks.title: Extend find with alt, title, first, last, nth
tasks.description: Extend find case in src/commands/meta.ts:735-774 with getByAltText, getByTitle, locator.first(), .last(), .nth(n). Update error message and CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse find alt 'Logo' finds elements by alt text
browse find title 'Close' finds elements by title attribute
browse find first .item returns first match
browse find nth 2 .item returns third match (0-indexed)
browse find last .item returns last match

tasks.title: Extend screenshot with element/ref support
tasks.description: Extend screenshot case in src/commands/meta.ts:233-308. Detect selector/ref vs path. Use locator.screenshot({ path }) for elements.
acceptanceCriteria: browse screenshot @e1 shot.png screenshots the ref element
browse screenshot '#header' header.png screenshots by CSS selector
browse screenshot page.png still works as output path
browse screenshot @e1 without path uses default path

tasks.title: Extend screenshot with --clip region
tasks.description: Extend screenshot case in src/commands/meta.ts:233-308. Add --clip x,y,w,h flag. Parse comma-separated values, pass as page.screenshot({ clip }). Mutual exclusion with selector and --full.
acceptanceCriteria: browse screenshot --clip 0,0,400,300 region.png captures specified region
browse screenshot --clip with invalid format throws usage error
browse screenshot --clip 0,0,400,300 --full throws mutual exclusion error

tasks.title: Add doctor meta command
tasks.description: Add doctor to src/commands/meta.ts. Checks Bun version, Playwright installed, Chromium binary exists, server health. Register in META_COMMANDS, SAFE_TO_RETRY, CLI help.
acceptanceCriteria: browse doctor reports Bun version, Playwright status, Chromium path
Missing Chromium shows actionable message
Command works when server is running

tasks.title: Test rightclick command
tasks.description: Add test in test/interactions.test.ts. Extend test/fixtures/interactions.html with contextmenu event listener.
acceptanceCriteria: Test right-clicks element and verifies contextmenu event fired
Test verifies ref selector works with rightclick

tasks.title: Test mouse subcommands
tasks.description: Add test in test/interactions.test.ts. Test mouse move, down, up, wheel using JS event listeners.
acceptanceCriteria: Test mouse move fires mousemove event at correct coordinates
Test mouse wheel changes scroll position
Test invalid subcommand throws error

tasks.title: Test extended wait variants
tasks.description: Add test in test/interactions.test.ts. Test wait --text, --fn, --load, --state hidden, wait <ms>.
acceptanceCriteria: Test wait --text detects text appearing after delay
Test wait --fn detects JS condition becoming true
Test wait 100 completes after ~100ms
Test wait <sel> --state hidden detects element disappearing

tasks.title: Test extended cookie commands
tasks.description: Add test in test/commands.test.ts. Test cookie clear and cookie set with options.
acceptanceCriteria: Test cookie clear removes all cookies
Test cookie set with --domain applies correct domain
Test existing cookie name=value still works

tasks.title: Test set geo and set media
tasks.description: Add test in test/features.test.ts. Verify geolocation and color scheme via JS eval.
acceptanceCriteria: Test set geo changes geolocation (verify via JS navigator.geolocation)
Test set media dark changes color scheme (verify via JS matchMedia)

tasks.title: Test --max-output flag
tasks.description: Add test in test/features.test.ts. Test truncation behavior on long output.
acceptanceCriteria: Test output longer than limit is truncated with notice
Test output shorter than limit is returned unchanged

tasks.title: Test box read command
tasks.description: Add test in test/commands.test.ts. Test bounding box returns valid JSON.
acceptanceCriteria: Test box returns valid JSON with numeric x, y, width, height
Test box with ref selector works
Test box with nonexistent selector throws error

tasks.title: Test errors read command
tasks.description: Add test in test/commands.test.ts. Use js command to trigger console.error(), verify errors returns only error entries.
acceptanceCriteria: Test errors shows error-level messages after console.error()
Test errors does not show console.log() messages
Test errors --clear clears error entries

tasks.title: Test extended find command
tasks.description: Add test in test/interactions.test.ts. Extend interactions.html with alt/title attributes. Test first/last/nth.
acceptanceCriteria: Test find alt finds image by alt text
Test find title finds element by title
Test find first .item returns first item
Test find nth 2 .item returns third item
Test find last .item returns last item

tasks.title: Test extended screenshot (element + clip)
tasks.description: Add test in test/features.test.ts. Test element screenshot and clip screenshot produce valid PNG files.
acceptanceCriteria: Test screenshot #header produces PNG smaller than full page
Test screenshot --clip 0,0,100,100 produces a cropped PNG
Test screenshot --clip with --full throws error
